options.name: -check_MemCpu
options.description: Checks the machine's physical memory and CPU resources. When specified, the software enables memory/CPU checking and reports a warning if the free memory is below 5 percent of the total memory or if the average CPU load large.

options.name: -diff_memory
options.description: output different peak memory and current memory between step start and step end

options.name: -end
options.description: Specifies the end point to measure the peak memory attained during a specific command

options.name: -memory_threshold
options.description: Specifies the threshold as ratio of total machine/LSF memory. Warning is to be flagged if available memory goes below this threshold

options.name: -peak
options.description: Reports current peak memory till a given point in a flow

options.name: -period
options.description: Period of checking the physical memory and CPU usage, default 1800s

options.name: -session_cpu
options.description: report current cpu and real time after report last step status

options.name: -start
options.description: Specifies the start point to measure the peak memory attained during a specific command
